projects.name: DashMobile
projects.tagline: Scrape your favorite websites for your favorite content, and then view it all in one place.
projects.description: React native app supported by node.js functions in aws lambda and using Dynamodb caching.

achievements.title: React native app that scrapes my favorite websites dynamically
achievements.description: so I can see the live music happening nearby.

achievements.title: Back end scrapes live data on each invocation
achievements.description: saving a user 15 mins/day by scraping up-to-date info on local venues websites. Implemented with nodejs and lambda functions that utilize puppeteer
details: Leverages a slim chromium version below lambda function size limit
Extracts data from web pages using puppeteer, waits for a selector before it starts scraping
Different sites run in parallel lambda functions at the same time for maximal performance
Cache results for one day to avoid abusive behavior toward local businesses websites
Skillfully parses date strings in a wide range of formats, ensuring comprehensive compatibility with nearly any date format
Supports recursive and iterative scraping configuration by accumulating results in a recursive and iterative manner to create extremely powerful configuration objects

achievements.title: Front end mobile application
achievements.description: Implemented in react-native as a mobile application, compatible with both IOS and Android. Front end utilizes google material design
